items.name: riso-utils
items.title: Riso Utils
items.description: Shared resolveRisoVars() helper. Converts a theme name and/or raw color props into an inline CSS variables object. Required by all riso UI components.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Risograph-style accordion with ink misregistration effects. Supports named theme presets and per-instance color overrides.
items.docs: Use the theme prop for named presets: theme="blue-pink". Use primary/secondary/overlap/paper props for raw color overrides. Set data-riso-theme on a parent element for section-level theming.
